title: Submission Request
description: An accepted submission request — sits in requests/ until it graduates to plans/. Contains enough information to generate a MOPPy batch config and locate the run on Gadi.

model.description: Human-readable model id matching plans/, e.g. ACCESS-ESM1.6

grid_label.description: CMIP grid label, usually gn (native grid)

activity_id.description: CMIP activity_id, e.g. CMIP or ScenarioMIP

gadi.description: Gadi-specific run location and resource information

project.description: NCI Gadi project code, e.g. p66

input_folder.description: Absolute path to the raw model output directory on Gadi, e.g. /g/data/p66/archive/...

output_folder.description: Absolute path where CMORised files will be written. Typically on /scratch.

worker_init.description: Shell commands to run before each PBS job (activate conda env, etc.)

file_patterns.description: Custom glob patterns per compound variable name, e.g. Amon.tas: output*/atmosphere/netCDF/*mon.nc

pbs.description: Default PBS resource request (can be overridden per-variable in the generated batch config)

cmip_metadata.description: Additional CMIP global attributes required for branched or scenario runs

branch_year.description: Calendar year the child run branches from the parent

run_dates.description: Nominal start/end of the model run

target_variables.description: Compound variable names (Table.short_name) or * for all. Defaults to what is in the plan.

contact.description: GitHub handle of the person responsible for this run, e.g. @rbeucher

requested_by.description: GitHub handle of the requester (may differ from contact)

requested_at.description: ISO date the request was opened

accepted_at.description: ISO date the request was accepted

issue.description: GitHub Issue number where this was proposed
